items.title: All of the salutes about Jaylen’s excellence in the community have had me thinking a lot about Reggie Lewis the last few days. Their dedication to people that needed help is so similar. Kind, empathetic men.

items.title: Busy day for Raptors who tell us second-round pick Jaden Bradley takes two-way deal, Noah Lewis becomes Raptors905 coach, Scott Brown is 905 GM and Luke Winn moves back to Raptors FO
items.author: Doug Smith
items.body_excerpt:
Busy day for Raptors who tell us second-round pick Jaden Bradley takes two-way deal, Noah Lewis becomes Raptors905 coach, Scott Brown is 905 GM and Luke Winn moves back to Raptors FO

And we await officialization of the Kawhi deal but there's a long trade call queue and it might be a day or so

items.title: Scott Brown Jr. will be the next Raptors 905 general manager, with Noah Lewis moving from the Raptors bench to 905 as head coach.
items.author: Blake Murphy
items.body_excerpt:
Scott Brown Jr. will be the next Raptors 905 general manager, with Noah Lewis moving from the Raptors bench to 905 as head coach.

Former GM Luke Winn staying in the organization in his Raptors NBA front office role.

items.title: NEW: The Celtics rookies were introduced at the Reggie Lewis Center after an afternoon spent with Boston youth.
items.author: Noa Dalzell
items.body_excerpt:
NEW: The Celtics rookies were introduced at the Reggie Lewis Center after an afternoon spent with Boston youth. 

“It feels like home already," said Chris Cenac. "I’m ready to get to it.”

More: 
www.celticsblog.com/boston-celti...

media.title: The Celtics rookies are in Boston, and they’re ready to get started
media.description: Rookies Chris Cenac Jr. and Dillon Mitchell spoke to reporters for the first time as Celtics.

Here at The Reggie Lewis Center, where the Celtics’ rookie class will soon arrive.

items.title: With the 60th pick of the NBA Draft the Washington Wizards select Malique Lewis!
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
With the 60th pick of the NBA Draft the Washington Wizards select Malique Lewis!

The 2026 NBA Draft is LIVE on ESPN.

items.title: Another one of my favorite "My Guys" Malique Lewis goes to the Bucks!
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Another one of my favorite "My Guys" Malique Lewis goes to the Bucks!

Lewis popped big time a couple of years ago in the G League when he was with Mexico City. Plays extremely hard. Showing signs of shooting it a little bit. Love this pick for the retooling Bucks.

items.title: Sources: The Milwaukee Bucks will select Malique Lewis with the 60th pick in the 2026 NBA Draft.

items.title: A lot makes you wonder with Len Bias. The Celtics surely would've been good in the 90s with him and Reggie Lewis. What would the drug laws have been if DC didn't overreact to Bias' death. A life cut short had so many ripple effects...
